findings.message: The in ItemBanner has no alt attribute, so screen readers cannot announce the image. This violates WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1 (Non-text Content).
findings.suggestion: Add an alt attribute describing the image, e.g. . If the image is purely decorative, use alt="" so assistive tech skips it.
